title: Baker Ross Christmas Character Bauble Decoration Kits – Pack of 3, Make Your Own Christmas Bauble Decoration, Christmas Decoration Craft Kit (AR759)
availability_text: Only 7 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Bauble Craft Kit: Kids can create festive Christmas sequin baubles that are perfect for hanging from Christmas trees. Children can decorate the round bauble shapes with sparkly sequin patterns and foam cut-outs, to create festive characters including Santa, snowman and elf

Kids Crafting: Kids of all abilities will be able to craft these easy to make festive baubles. These baubles are mess free and have all the pieces that kids need to embellish decorations. This multipack of baubles is sure to keep boys and girls entertained this Christmas and is perfect for crafting at home and at school

Christmas Crafts: Kids can simply push the safe plastic pins through the sequin holes to attach sequins to the foam bauble base. Decorations can be finished by using the handy hanging ribbon supplied, and then hung from Christmas trees or at Christmas parties as festive decorations

Included in the Pack: This pack contains 3 kits, in 3 assorted designs – including Santa, snowman and elf. Each kit contains foam template, self-adhesive foam stickers, wiggle-eyes, 6cm polystyrene half-ball, sequins, safe plastic pins and ribbon Bauble size 14.5cm tall. For ages 5+

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Product Description These cool Christmas characters are sure to add a little sparkle to your Christmas tree! Each kit contains foam template, self-adhesive foam stickers, wiggle-eyes, 6cm polystyrene half-ball, sequins, safe plastic pins & ribbon. 3 assorted designs - Santa, Snowman & Elf. Use with our foam glue or glue dots (not included). Instruction sheet included. Glue required. Safety Warning WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months - small parts, long cord & functional sharp points. Choking & strangulation hazard. Retain address.
